Claude Design 有一个完整的 Agent 运行环境，如果把它跟 Claude Code 比较的话，只是它基于浏览器和虚拟机来构建的。它有45个工具，有24个内置skills。运行方式也是基于 Agentic Loop。

所以它就是一个完整的 Agent Harness。 https://t.co/QKnBqSMYSK
We need more real time data on how AI may be impacting the economy - this is a really useful addition.

"Switch to a cheaper model to save money" is a problem because cheaper models are worse (maybe they are good enough for a particular purpose, but still worse).

More often a better approach is hierarchies of models, with smart models are orchestrators and auditors of cheap ones.
Fable: "write me a rhyming poem with six four line stanzas, each stanza removes another vowel. the first has no u, the second no u or i, etc." https://t.co/0LqYCQzFsX

My Lovable clone built with Fable 5 Can build apps with any AI model 

S/O @vercel AI gateway. https://t.co/UydzxSyFJk

I used Claude Fable 5 to turn network traffic into an ant colony.

Packets are ants. When the network gets congested, ants pile up in the tunnels. When packet loss hits, a spider shows up and eats them.

There's a live dashboard tracking everything in real time. You can watch the https://t.co/u7eKDyey91

Want something that can help you build somethin better? Check this out.

Turn Claude into 20+ different specialists for marketing & business.

Install real expertise, not just prompts.

Get my Claude skills bundle 👇
https://t.co/4GX8faMyEP

I gave Claude Opus 4.8 and Fable 5 the exact same prompt. "Build a fully playable chess app in one shot."

The full prompt asked for legal move validation including castling, en passant, and pawn promotion. Check and checkmate detection. An AI opponent with 3 difficulty levels. https://t.co/FJ59QDBtAk

Full Prompt:

Build a fully playable chess app as a single interactive artifact. Requirements: complete legal move validation (including castling, en passant, pawn promotion, check and checkmate detection), an AI opponent with 3 selectable difficulty levels, a move history panel

Sure, chess apps are cool, but here's something with a more practical use.

https://t.co/4GX8faMyEP

ANOTHER ONE-SHOT TEST.

Claude Fable 5 vs Opus 4.8, this time building an isometric 3D city traffic simulator in Three.js.

A full city grid with roads, intersections, 3D buildings, 20+ cars driving at once, working traffic lights, car queuing, day/night toggle with headlights, https://t.co/wFEZERNSNK

Full prompt I used for both models:

Build an isometric 3D city traffic simulator as a single interactive artifact using Three.js. Requirements: a city grid of roads, intersections, and simple 3D buildings; at least 20 cars driving the roads simultaneously with smooth movement;

You don't need to keep testing prompts if you have good skill markdowns.

A rampaging monster turns into a https://t.co/HHVfy1wUQT

.@pmarca: "The person who writes down the thing has tremendous power."

@david_perell https://t.co/TdLCJs7t9r

Fable 5 + Firefly Boards = a fully playable game starring my pet turtle Pablo 🤯

Took me less than an hour 

Every asset made with Firefly
Tutorial and my workflow 👇 https://t.co/vSiGlmau4g

Step 1: 
Make assets in Firefly Boards using different models, like Nano Banana 2 and/or GPT Image 2 
A lot of people don't even know about this free AI tool, which also includes daily free generations and you can share your board with friends to collaborate. https://t.co/tfQKzWQ01n

Step 2: 
You can play with my assets. Here's my Firefly Board for you to play with 
https://t.co/qwGjVukG6x

Step 3: 
Claude Fable 5 is a powerful model. It's awesome at making stuff but doesn't generate good assets by itself, that's where you'll use your Firefly Boards assets as an input 
Here's my prompt and assets (you can download, remix them from the board I shared in Step 2): https://t.co/x6K5ERMMKa

Step 4: 
It'll generate you a game and a process of iteration will begin. You may see how some assets you may need to edit. I worked on a background in Firefly Boards a lot making it longer and editing it right there (it includes Generative Fill, Expand and lots of models) https://t.co/5m8qwnFhD9

Step 5: 
Upload your updated asset into Fable 5 and write a prompt. Don't laugh that I'm extra polite with my AI tools :)) https://t.co/Cbk8sVxaSC

Step 6: 
When my game was working properly I realized I want to add some stuff. For example, my turtle Pablo who's featured in the game LOVES strawberries, so I generated some berried assets and modified the game 
I made assets in Firefly Boards using Nano Banana 2 + GPT Image 2 https://t.co/1qVKe6kSa6

Step 7: 
Then I wrote this prompt and used new asset to Fable 5 https://t.co/0WXCftPpXt

Step 8: 
The game is 100% playable and is a great fun. 
I created an artifact for you so you can play. Here's the link. Arrows to control and "A" key to speed up Pablo :)) 

Avoid pipes and collect strawberries :) Tell me how many you've got! 
https://t.co/dUgY9LOa0j

Here's a mobile version of the game you can play on your phone (running as Claude artifact) 

https://t.co/MKhaB1TsyQ
Turns out r doesn’t always > g.
